title: 仪征中考距离感说明视频
source_summary: 新初二、新初三家长容易以为中考还远，但明天几千名初三学生奔赴考场、今年阵仗和分流比例都在提醒时间已经逼近。

story_arc.hook: 明天几千名学生进入考场，下一批家长还以为很远。
story_arc.pain: 新初二、新初三家长觉得还有一年、两年，不着急。
story_arc.conflict: 中考阵仗和分流比例不会等家长慢慢进入状态。
story_arc.proof: 今年中考现场就是最直观的提醒。
story_arc.solution: 把距离错觉改成现在开始看路径、节奏和风险。

visual_system.style: white canvas, black hand-drawn structure lines, sparse red/orange/blue Chinese annotations, Xiaohei 2.0 original 3D animated collectible protagonist

shots.purpose: Open with immediate exam pressure and local specificity.
shots.voice_text: 看着明天仪征几千名初三学生奔赴考场。
shots.subtitle: 明天，几千名学生进考场
shots.camera: static whiteboard frame with a slight push feel from animated elements
shots.composition: Large left headline, right hand-drawn exam gate and ticket pile; Xiaohei 2.0 presses a red tomorrow stamp.

xiaohei_action.identity_anchor: matte black rounded 3D collectible protagonist with glossy eyes
xiaohei_action.action: presses a red stamp onto exam tickets
xiaohei_action.stability_constraints: keep eyes, rounded silhouette and hand position stable while red dust moves around the stamp

shots.image_prompt: 16:9 white canvas Chinese explainer illustration, black hand-drawn exam gate and ticket pile, sparse red handwritten mark, original black 3D animated collectible protagonist pressing a red stamp, large whitespace, no PPT, no existing IP copy
shots.motion_prompt: Entrance of headline, exam gate draws in, stamp drops, red paper dust settles.

vfx_contract.material: red ink and tiny paper dust
vfx_contract.motion_path: press downward, spread along paper edges, settle
vfx_contract.light_interaction: red only sits on paper surface, no glow
vfx_contract.stability_constraints: do not deform character eyes or exam gate
vfx_contract.prompt_ready_phrase: red ink stamp presses onto the exam ticket pile, tiny red paper dust spreads along the paper edges, then settles into a short tomorrow mark

shots.notes: Hook must finish inside first 3 seconds.

shots.voice_text: 新初二、新初三的家长们，你们以为中考离你们还远吗？
shots.subtitle: 你以为还远吗？
shots.camera: horizontal push into a folding distance line
shots.composition: Labels for new grade 8 and new grade 9 sit far from an exam gate; Xiaohei 2.0 pulls an orange line and the distance folds shorter.

xiaohei_action.identity_anchor: matte black rounded 3D collectible protagonist with glossy eyes
xiaohei_action.action: pulls the orange distance line shorter
xiaohei_action.stability_constraints: keep hand on the line while the line folds

shots.image_prompt: white canvas, black hand-drawn distance map from new grade 8 and new grade 9 to exam gate, sparse orange path line, original 3D black collectible protagonist pulling the line shorter, short Chinese annotation
shots.motion_prompt: Orange line folds inward; labels nudge closer to the exam gate.

vfx_contract.source: label area under 新初二 / 新初三
vfx_contract.material: orange hand-drawn line and black ink dots
vfx_contract.motion_path: long line folds into a short arrow at the exam gate
vfx_contract.light_interaction: no glow, only paper pressure marks
vfx_contract.object_interaction: grade labels tilt slightly as the line is pulled
vfx_contract.dissipation: black ink dots settle near the shortened arrow
vfx_contract.endpoint: short orange arrow at the exam gate
vfx_contract.stability_constraints: line must not cross the subtitle
vfx_contract.prompt_ready_phrase: orange hand-drawn distance line folds shorter as the character pulls it, black ink dots fall beside the path, and the line stops as a short arrow at the exam gate

shots.notes: No factual date conversion; keep the user's relative wording.

shots.purpose: Break the one-year or two-year buffer illusion.
shots.voice_text: 总觉得还有一年、两年时间，不着急。
shots.subtitle: 一年两年，不是缓冲
shots.camera: vertical push into a calendar-hourglass metaphor
shots.composition: A paper calendar cracks into a simple hourglass; black paper sand drops while Xiaohei 2.0 tries to catch it.

xiaohei_action.identity_anchor: matte black rounded 3D collectible protagonist with glossy eyes
xiaohei_action.stability_constraints: hands remain below the falling grains; eyes remain visible

shots.image_prompt: white canvas, hand-drawn calendar turning into hourglass, black paper sand falling, original black 3D animated collectible protagonist catching grains, red warning note, large whitespace
shots.motion_prompt: Calendar cracks, grains fall, character dips to catch them, red warning note snaps in.

vfx_contract.material: black paper sand and gray pencil dust
vfx_contract.motion_path: grains fall downward into protagonist hands and a small pile
vfx_contract.light_interaction: grains stay crisp black on white canvas
vfx_contract.endpoint: small countdown pile under the calendar
vfx_contract.stability_constraints: do not cover subtitle or character eyes
vfx_contract.prompt_ready_phrase: black paper sand drops from the cracked calendar, the character catches some grains while the rest falls, pencil dust sinks and forms a small countdown pile

shots.notes: The phrase 不着急 should visually feel unsafe, not relaxed.

shots.purpose: Turn the exam scene and split ratio into a concrete decision gate without inventing numbers.
shots.voice_text: 但你看看今年中考的阵仗和分流比例。
shots.subtitle: 看阵仗，也看分流
shots.camera: squeeze transition into a split gate
shots.composition: Hand-drawn crowd lines enter a split gate; Xiaohei 2.0 adjusts the pivot; blue notes label 阵仗 and 比例, with no numeric claim.

xiaohei_action.identity_anchor: matte black rounded 3D collectible protagonist with glossy eyes
xiaohei_action.stability_constraints: character holds the lever while blue notes move around the gate

shots.image_prompt: white canvas, black hand-drawn crowd lines entering a split gate, no exact percentages, blue system notes, orange route accents, original black 3D collectible protagonist turning the gate lever
shots.motion_prompt: Gate squeezes in; crowd lines split; blue notes arc from the pivot and settle.

vfx_contract.material: blue sticky notes, thin blue lines and ink dots
vfx_contract.motion_path: arc from gate pivot to both split paths
vfx_contract.object_interaction: gate rotates slightly and crowd lines divide
vfx_contract.dissipation: blue dots fade near the ratio note
vfx_contract.endpoint: notes stop beside 阵仗 and 比例
vfx_contract.prompt_ready_phrase: blue system notes arc out from the split gate pivot, stick beside the two paths, and tiny blue ink dots fade near the ratio label

shots.voice_text: 别等考场到了才紧张。现在就该看路径。
shots.subtitle: 现在就看路径
shots.camera: gentle push into a door-and-route ending
shots.composition: Xiaohei 2.0 opens a simple door; behind it three short path labels appear: 目标, 节奏, 风险; orange line stops at 现在.

xiaohei_action.identity_anchor: matte black rounded 3D collectible protagonist with glossy eyes
xiaohei_action.contact_point: door edge and orange route line
xiaohei_action.stability_constraints: keep push pose stable while route line draws

shots.image_prompt: white canvas, simple hand-drawn door opening to three short Chinese route labels target pace risk, orange route line, original black 3D animated collectible protagonist pushing door, sparse annotations
shots.motion_prompt: Door opens; orange route draws through three labels; final black anchor dots settle.

vfx_contract.material: thin orange line and black anchor dots
vfx_contract.motion_path: slide from door, touch 目标 节奏 风险, stop at 现在
vfx_contract.light_interaction: line traces the door without glow
vfx_contract.dissipation: black dots settle near 现在
vfx_contract.endpoint: orange line stops beside now mark
vfx_contract.prompt_ready_phrase: thin orange route line slides from behind the opened door, touches target, pace and risk labels, then stops beside the now mark as black anchor dots settle

shots.notes: CTA is a derived operating line, not a factual claim.

problems: Source copy is short, so final CTA is inferred from the warning intent.
fixes: Avoid invented data; keep final action generic: 看路径、看节奏、看风险。
